title: UK Timber Procurement Policy: review of certification schemes
body: "The forest certification schemes Grown in Britain (GiB), Forest Stewardship Council (FSC), and the Programme for Endorsement of Forest Certification (PEFC) are being reviewed to see if they meet the criteria under Category A evidence of the UK Timber Procurement Policy (TPP).  We invite stakeholders to submit evidence of certification schemes’ compliance, in preparation for the review. Comments can be submitted through an online survey.  Comments providing evidence of non-compliance will be submitted to the schemes and included in the final public report. "
